title: Select Port to forward K8s Service to
body:
### Feature request description

It would be nice to select the local port to forward the service to. Currently, when I click port forward, it will forward to 500x (ie. 5001, 5002, etc.)

### Suggest potential solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

### Have you considered any alternatives?

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

### Additional context

Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.

comments.body: It is not clear what you are asking here.
did you mean to file this for [podman-desktop](https://github.com/podman-desktop/podman-desktop) ?

Yes, how do I select the port to forward the service to? 

https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/9cc6f23c-b584-40ec-83c4-c8eb3cfb856b
what you are asking seems specific to podman-desktop.  I cannot seem to transfer issues between github organizations, but you file it https://github.com/podman-desktop/podman-desktop/issues
